{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Akura man
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Ghostwater (novel)|Ghostwater]]
}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Akura man]] has purple eyes.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c3">''Ghostwater'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
